title: Everbuild Stixall Extreme Power | High Bonding Strength Building Adhesive, Suitable for Automative Gap Filling and Sealing - Crystal Clear - 290 ml (Pack of 3)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Interior and Exterior Uses: Ideal for bonding mirrors to most common surfaces, jointing cladding panels, automotive gap filing, sealing and much more
Instant High Grab Adhesive: Using hybrid polymer technology Stixall takes the features of polyurethane and silicone to form the incredible high strength, high grab, primerless adhesive
Excellent primerless adhesion to most surfaces, including glass, most plastics, metals, concrete, plaster, plasterboard, Wood, perspex, glass, polyester, enamel, painted surfaces etc

Multifunctional: High instant grab adhesion to most external and internal surfaces including metals, glass, plastic, plasterboard, concrete, polyester, Wood, Perspex, enamel, painted surfaces and much more
APPLICATION: Apply using a caulk, sealant / adhesive cartridge application gun, we recommend the Everbuild Power Pro Heavy Duty Sealant / Adhesive Cartridge Applicator Gun
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces must be clean and dust free. Cut the tip of the nozzleand place the cartridge into a caulkinggun. Gun the adhesiveonto the substrate/area to be bondedand pressthe elementto be bondedby hand. Apply the sealant in a continuous joint and smooth it out. The video showcases the product in use.
